name: openpocket-phone
description: Control OpenPocket Android emulator and physical-phone targets from Codex through ergonomic local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Control Android phones and emulators through OpenPocket
interface.longDescription: OpenPocket Phone gives Codex a local phone-use surface for Android emulator and physical-phone targets. It uses OpenPocket's ADB runtime for target status, app discovery and launch, text-only UI snapshots, visible-text search, tap-by-text actions, screenshots, gestures, Unicode text input, and narrow Android shell inspection without relying on desktop Computer Use.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my Android target with OpenPocket
Open an Android app and tap by text
Check whether my phone target is ready
